resources.string: ShopMe
A full shopping bag with animated grocery characters
Close button
Add button
Aldi logo
dm logo
Edeka logo
Kaufland logo
Lidl logo
Müller logo
Netto logo
Norma logo
Rewe logo
Rossmann logo
A cute animated tomato character with big eyes and a smile
A cute animated carrot character with green leaves and a big smile
A cute animated microphone character with big eyes and a smile
A group of cute animated bakery items: a baguette, a muffin, a donut, and a croissant
Three cute animated cans: peas, tomato, and tuna, with expressive faces and open lids
A freshly baked loaf of bread in a basket with green beans on the side
A collection of cute bakery items including a flour bag, bread loaf, croissant, and grains, all with happy faces
A cute animated cheese wedge with big eyes, a smile, and cheese holes
A cute animated soda bottle character with a happy face, surrounded by bubbles and green olives
A group of cute animated drink characters: a soda bottle, a coffee cup, and an orange juice glass with ice and orange slices
A cute animated blue fish on a bed of lettuce with tomatoes, lemon slices, and a fish skeleton
A blue cooler bag filled with various cute animated frozen food items: fish sticks, peas, shrimp, pizza, and ice cream
A group of cute animated ready meal characters: ramen cup, pizza box, and a meal tray with mashed potatoes and meatballs
A colorful group of happy animated fruit characters including an apple, banana, grapes, and others
A group of cute animated meat characters: a steak, a bacon slice, and a sausage, with expressive faces and garnish
A cute animated salami character with a shocked face and two slices in front
A group of cute animated dairy alternative characters: almond milk carton, oat milk bottle, coconut, and grain sack
A group of cute animated dairy products: milk, cheese, yogurt, eggs, and butter.
A group of happy pasta characters: a bag of penne, a bundle of spaghetti with a red ribbon, and macaroni pieces on the ground
A group of happy animated oil bottles and seeds, including olive oil and sunflower oil with cheerful faces
A happy animated rice sack and a bowl of rice with friendly faces and a wooden scoop
A trio of happy animated sauce bottles: ketchup, mustard, and hot sauce, with fresh ingredients like tomatoes, peppers, and garlic
FISH STICKS
PEAS
SHRIMP
PIZZA
ICE
ALMOND\nMILK
OAT\nMILK
MILCH
JOGHURT
NUDELN
REIS
MUSTARD
HOT\nSAUCE
A group of happy animated snack characters: soda, chips, chocolate, and popcorn
A colorful group of happy animated sweets characters including a cupcake, cookie, chocolate bar, and lollipop
CHIPS
A group of happy animated spice characters: salt shaker, paprika jar, oil bottle, chili peppers, garlic, and a bowl of spices
PAPRIKA
STANDARD
A golden checkmark with a crown and a blue ribbon labeled STANDARD, surrounded by stars and leaves.
A colorful group of happy animated vegan characters including an avocado, tofu, plant milk, and a tomato, with a large green VEGAN ribbon.
PLANT\nMILK
VEGAN
VEGGIE
A colorful group of happy animated veggie characters including a broccoli, burger, carrot, tofu, milk and a tomato, with a large wooden VEGGIE ribbon and a checkmark.
A colorful group of happy animated vegetable characters including a tomato, carrot, corn, and others
A worried animated alarm clock with an hourglass, indicating running out of time
Illustration showing two happy smartphones with arrows and a checkmark, indicating a successful synchronization.
Illustration showing a laptop and a smartphone with worried faces, circular arrows, and a warning triangle, indicating a synchronization error.
